_meta.source: State donation policy research — first-person consent laws, DMV integration, Medicaid transplant coverage, living donor protections, hospital referral requirements
_meta.notes: Extended from 24 states to all 50 + DC. Scores based on: first-person consent strength (25%), DMV donor registration integration (20%), Medicaid transplant coverage breadth (20%), living donor protections/leave laws (15%), required referral/notification laws (10%), state funding for OPOs (10%)
